name: Sci-Fi Guns Pack
description: Standalone H-release compatible sci-fi gun pack for CDDA. Adds plasma, electrical, magnetic, arc, coil and photon/laser guns with custom ammo and magazines. Uses direct H item types GUN/AMMO/MAGAZINE and no UPS dependency. Includes 32x32 gun, ammo, and magazine tiles. Item JSON is split into guns, ammo, and magazines folders. The tilesheets are stored in a tileset folder and referenced from mod_tileset.json. Adds strict real item group hooks; guns, ammo, and magazines are separated.
